title: Architect Protocol Bridging Gateways
description: Implement specialized proxies (e.g., Nginx, Envoy) for protocol translation. Architect protocol bridging gateways to enable compatibility between WebSocket, gRPC, and REST clients.
objectives: Implement specialized proxies (e.g., Nginx, Envoy) for protocol translation.
Architect protocol bridging gateways to enable compatibility between WebSocket, gRPC, and REST clients.
